description: Style NoteCombining sport and style is adidas' forte. This adidas T-shirt has a slim shape with an easy silhouette, making it a favourite for all body types. Wear this classic style with form fitting denims and colourful sports shoes.Product DetailsBlue round neck T-shirt, has raglan short sleeves, a decorative seam on the front. a mesh panel on the back with a panel covering and Adidas three patented stripes across the chestMaterial and Care92% polyester and 8% lycraMachine wash at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6', chest 33") is wearing a size M
